messages.content: You are a semantic compression engine. Compress the input into minimal tokens while preserving all information for equivalent LLM reasoning. Use dense notation: labeled fields, standard abbreviations, and symbols (→ | + @). Never lose information.

Compress:
Can you provide directions to the Reed Messe Wien Congress Centre from Kaiserebersdorf via public transport? Answer according to: The City Airport Train (CAT) Wien Mitte/Landstrasse is a 20 minute direct trip (approximately) to the centre of Vienna. The ride costs EUR 11.
Take the U2 metro line at Karlsplatz in the direction of Seestadt.
Take line 11A, bus from Heiligenstadt, in the direction of Seestadt.
Take line 80B, bus from Kaiserebersdorf, in the direction of Seestadt.
IMPORTANT: Ask the taxi driver to take you to Foyer D, the entrance of the Reed Messe Wien Congress Centre, Messe Platz 1 – 1021 Vienna, (close to Krieau metro station).
On-site registration, congress material pick-up, and badge collection are available in the registration area situated at Foyer D, just inside the main entrance.
The ILC Press Office will be located in Press Center C on the Ground floor of the Reed Messe Congress Center. Media representatives will be notified about the location of the ILC Press Office at the time of their arrival and registration in Vienna.
Accredited journalists must collect their press badge on-site from the registration desk. The badge will permit admission to the media areas.
Visit the ebooks-etools page to view all ebook versions or download PDF files.
Create your own personal schedule using the interactive programme.
Download your copy of the Scientific Programme eBook.
We strongly recommend downloading all eBooks and apps before arriving at the event.
No password or code is required.
The exhibition is located in Hall B.
Join the ePoster Tour onsite!
Full details will be provided in the ILC 2015 Congress App.
Complimentary lunch, coffee and tea will be served during breaks, and are included in the registration fee.

Can you provide more information on the ePoster Tour and how to join it?

Can you tell me where I can pick up my badge and congress materials at the Reed Messe Wien Congress Centre?

Reed Messe Wien Congress Centre directions from Kaiserebersdorf | public transport:

CAT Wien Mitte/Landstrasse @ 20min → Vienna center | EUR 11
U2 metro @ Karlsplatz → Seestadt
Bus 11A @ Heiligenstadt → Seestadt
Bus 80B @ Kaiserebersdorf → Seestadt

Badge + materials pickup: Foyer D (entrance) @ Messe Platz 1, 1021 Vienna | near Krieau metro

ILC Press Office: Press Center C, Ground floor | media reps notified @ registration

ePoster Tour: onsite | details in ILC 2015 Congress App

eBooks/etools: download PDF | no password/code required | schedule: interactive programme

Exhibition: Hall B

Lunch/coffee/tea: complimentary @ breaks | included in registration fee
